violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the back of the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Person in charge has maintenance service pending for back doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025
The non-food contact surfaces all the refrigeration units (interior and exterior) have an accumulation of dust, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/24/2023

The following was observed in poor repair: 1) The floor tiles behind the counter and in the kitchen were observed in poor repair. 2) The wall next to the walk-in cooler was observed with a hole. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025

The floors in the basement and dry storage shelving has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Pie was placed hot in the front display refrigerator. The ambient temperature of the refrigeration unit was observed at 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Ambient temperature observed at 41 degrees Fahrenheit after pies were removed. Person in charge moved pies to the freezer to rapidly cool. Cooling methods guide left with PIC at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024
Knives located in the kitchen area was not in good repair (chipped). Knives were disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024
The non-food contact surfaces all the refrigeration units (interior and exterior) have an accumulation of dust, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. New Violation. Correct By: 08/24/2023
The floor tiles behind the counter and in the kitchen were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2024
The floors under the dry ingredients (flour, sugar, etc.) was observed with an accumulation of food debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024
Inspector observed bag of sugar with flour bugs. PIC voluntarily disposed of sugar. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher.PIC informed. Staff to rewash and sanitize utensils. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

The door to the outside, located in the back kitchen area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023
Food product were observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the food storage shelves throughout kitchen, refrigerators labeled 1&2 in basement have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2023

The floors throughout the facility including walk in freezers have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023
Utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2023

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023
The gasket of the walk-in freezer was observed to be frayed. Equipment must be maintained in proper adjustment and good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the fan covers in the walk-in cooler observed with an accumulation of dust, as well as the fan and the vent in the kitchen. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. New Violation. Correct By: 08/24/2023
The condensate from the refrigeration unit is draining into the 3-bay sink. Condensate drainage and other non-sewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2023
The floor tiles behind the counter and in the kitchen were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023
